programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: An inspirational account of basketball coach Ken Carter, who received both praise and criticism when he made headlines for benching his entire undefeated team for poor academic performance.

programme.title: Black Snake Moan
programme.desc: A God-fearing bluesman takes to a wild young woman who, as a victim of childhood sexual abuse, looks everywhere for love, never quite finding it.

programme.title: Basic
programme.desc: A Former Army Ranger Now Turned DEA Agent Is Called In To Investigate the Disappearance of a Drill Sergeant And Several of His Cadets During a Training Mission Gone Severely Awry In the Panamanian Jungle.

programme.title: Changing Lanes
programme.desc: Late for court, an attorney weaves in and out of traffic. In a different lane, a father whose right to see his children rests on getting to court on time. A minor accident will turn these two strangers into beasts.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: An inspirational account of basketball coach Ken Carter, who received both praise and criticism when he made headlines for benching his entire undefeated team for poor academic performance.

programme.title: Black Snake Moan
programme.desc: A God-fearing bluesman takes to a wild young woman who, as a victim of childhood sexual abuse, looks everywhere for love, never quite finding it.

programme.title: Changing Lanes
programme.desc: Late for court, an attorney weaves in and out of traffic. In a different lane, a father whose right to see his children rests on getting to court on time. A minor accident will turn these two strangers into beasts.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Habitats High & Low
programme.desc: Come along on today’s adventure to Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, Kenya’s Masai Mara, Panama’s Forest Canopy and many more amazing animal ecosystems, as Jack counts them down all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for an adventure to Santa Cruz Island where he visits the mating grounds of giant Galapagos Tortoises. Then he dives into the Pacific Ocean for an encounter with Galapagos Penguins and Sea Turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack accompanies four Florida manatees on a long distance flight from Sea World, Orlando to the Columbus Zoo in Ohio.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle as he saddles up for six amazing ranching adventures! From working a dude ranch in Canada to herding sheep with Patagonian gauchos, and cattle ranching in Montana, Jack is living the ultimate cowboy life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Conservation Heroes
programme.desc: Come along on this adventure as Jack counts down his heroes! From legends in the conservation world… to everyday folks who have dedicated their lives to animals, meet people who are making a difference for animals, like elephants, rhinos, horses and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On a camel trek in Israel, Jack learns first hand about the animal's unique physiology and important contribution to early trade. Later, Jack visits the International Camel Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: You're Endangered, Baby
programme.desc: What does it take to save a species from extinction? Patience, education and lots of babies! Today, Jungle Jack is counting down six endangered species surviving against all odds -- one baby at a time.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his daughter Kathaleen as they travel to Tanzania's Tarangire National Park. They search for an elusive elephant called Big Mamma and encounter tons of wildlife along the way.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Cutest Baby Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he counts down the cutest and cuddliest baby animals!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Just outside the city of Santiago, Chile there are people working to conserve and protect their native wildlife. Join Jack as he meets up with a family who started out taking in abandoned pets and ended up running a rehab center for rescued primates.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Home Turf
programme.desc: Meet the animals that are masters of their domain. These creatures know how to protect their territories and themselves. Hippos, elephants, guanacos, elephant seals and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Take a peek behind-the-scenes of some massive animal transport operations, all to help animals in need, like bringing a gorilla to his doctor’s appointment, herding blesbok to food-filled savannahs and many more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack visits a local market in a Peruvian jungle town to get a first-hand look at how the illegal pet trade is threatening many native species. Then he and Sue meet a man who's making a big difference for hundreds of primates on Monkey Island.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jungle Critters
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers creatures living in the deep, dark jungle. Elusive reptiles like pythons and caimans, river-dwellers like piranha and Amazonian manatees and massive primates like lowland gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack on this unforgettable journey as he connects with some of the selfless heroes of the animal world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his wife Sue are in Montana meeting up with some amazing people who are taking animal rescue to whole new level! First, a couple that left big city life to run a ranch dedicated to animals in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of life on the Hanna's farm. Then he and Sue meet a couple that have dedicated their lives to providing a home for disabled dogs, cats, and horses. Jack heads to the eastern front of the Rocky Mountains for an old-fashioned cattle drive!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Canada's British Columbia, Jack flies by floatplane to Knight Inlet where he observes Grizzly Bears fattening up for hibernation on Pacific Salmon.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The Atacama Desert in northern Chile is known as the highest and driest desert in the world. Jack wants to explore it all-from colorful flamingos to rare cats and even a newly discovered species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Need for Speed
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is taking a ride in the fast lane with some of nature’s speediest creatures…horses, kangaroos, cheetah, falcons and more. Don’t blink! You might miss one of today’s super-sonic species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Ecuador's highlands to visit a colorful Ecuadorian market before heading to Parque Condor, a rehabilitation center for injured and orphaned birds of prey, like Owls, Eagles, and Condors.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the far reaches of the beautiful Samburu lands in Northern Kenya, come along with Jack for an unforgettable elephant adventure, with legendary Save the Elephants founder Iain Douglas Hamilton.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack takes his grandson on an epic Serengeti safari. They witness Cheetahs and Lions on the savannah, Wildebeest, and Zebra starting their annual migration, and visit a local Maasai school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head to Rwanda for an incredible encounter with Golden Monkeys before getting a taste of the local fishing traditions, and they visit a primary school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack explores the red island known as Rabida in Ecuador's Galapagos Islands. See Darwin Finches, Sea Lions, Pelicans and loads of other creatures living on the enchanting island!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack discovers the incredible dedication of caregivers in the hills of Tennessee's Smoky Mountains. Baby Birds, Raccoons, Possums and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Help Wanted
programme.desc: There’s no job too big or small for Jungle Jack as he gets to work as a horse farrier, baboon crossing guard, beekeeper and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Botswana's Okavango Delta, Jack's daughter, Kathaleen, joins him on safari. Together at Vumbura Camp, father and daughter encounter lions, then strike out on their own adventures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack brings us bouncing baby animals from around the world. Some are cute, some are cuddly, and some bring us hope for the next generation of wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi discover beekeepers working to protect the forest, and Jack meets the sacred cows of Rwanda.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he takes his adventures to a whole new level with this journey through one of Africa's most pristine wild places. He finds baby elephants, rhinos, cheetahs, lions, hippos, and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue are headed to Paso Robles, California to go behind the scenes at the "Zoo to You" ranch, where rescued wildlife become animal ambassadors. They get up close and personal with a Bear, Bengal Tiger, Camel, Peregrine Falcon, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack and Suzi are stunned to see the Great Migration in action as animals cross the Mara River into Tanzania's Serengeti National Park.

programme.title: Carol for Another Christmas
programme.desc: Three ghosts visit a bitter man (Sterling Hayden) who has never recovered from losing his son during World War II.

programme.title: Three Godfathers
programme.desc: In the desert, three Old West outlaws (Chester Morris, Lewis Stone, Walter Brennan) adopt the baby of a dying woman.

programme.title: Star in the Night
programme.desc: The owner of a motel helps a couple on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Christmas Eve
programme.desc: An eccentric spinster's (Ann Harding) three foster sons must reunite to save her estate from a scheming nephew.

programme.title: Bundle of Joy
programme.desc: A salesgirl's (Debbie Reynolds) boss (Adolphe Menjou) thinks his son (Eddie Fisher) fathered the baby that she found on a doorstep.

programme.title: Meet Me in St. Louis
programme.desc: A St. Louis lawyer's (Leon Ames) family (Judy Garland, Margaret O'Brien) stays in town for the 1904 World's Fair.

programme.title: It Happened on 5th Avenue
programme.desc: A hobo (Victor Moore) shares a New York mansion with a veteran (Don DeFore) and others who need a wintertime place to stay.

programme.title: Christmas in Connecticut
programme.desc: The publisher (Sydney Greenstreet) of a women's magazine has his best columnist (Barbara Stanwyck) play holiday host to a Navy hero (Dennis Morgan).

programme.title: The Shop Around the Corner
programme.desc: The more Budapest co-workers (Margaret Sullavan, James Stewart) fight, the more they fall in love as secret pen pals.

programme.title: The Bishop's Wife
programme.desc: A suave angel (Cary Grant) saves a woman (Loretta Young) and her Episcopal husband (David Niven) from spiritual doubt and marital woe.

programme.title: Without Reservations
programme.desc: Two Marines (John Wayne, Don DeFore) meet a woman writer (Claudette Colbert) on a train to Hollywood.

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Dickens' London miser Ebenezer Scrooge (Reginald Owen) meets the ghosts of Christmases past, present and yet to come.

programme.title: Beyond Tomorrow
programme.desc: Three tycoons play Cupid for a couple (Richard Carlson, Jean Parker) on Christmas Eve, then guide them from the hereafter.

programme.title: Hell's Heroes
programme.desc: Three outlaws (Charles Bickford, Raymond Hatton, Fred Kohler) promise a dying mother they will take her newborn to the child's father.

programme.title: Kind Lady
programme.desc: A British con man (Maurice Evans) and his gang hold an elderly art-lover (Ethel Barrymore) prisoner in her home.

programme.title: Never Say Goodbye
programme.desc: A little girl (Patti Brady) schemes to reunite her mother (Eleanor Parker) and famous calendar-artist father (Errol Flynn).

programme.title: All Mine to Give
programme.desc: An orphan (Rex Thompson) raised by Scottish pioneers (Glynis Johns, Cameron Mitchell) in Wisconsin seeks homes for his five younger siblings on Christmas.

programme.title: The Great Rupert
programme.desc: Rupert, a dancing squirrel, is left to fend for himself on the streets after his master turns bankrupt; unsuited for the hard life, Rupert devises a scheme to raise his master's family from poverty.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Four sisters in Massachusetts forge unbreakable family ties in this adaptation of Louisa May Alcott's story.

programme.title: In the Good Old Summertime
programme.desc: The more co-workers (Judy Garland, Van Johnson) fight in a Chicago music store, the more they fall in love as secret pen pals.

programme.title: Holiday Affair
programme.desc: A war widow (Janet Leigh) has a 6-year-old son, and two men (Robert Mitchum, Wendell Corey) who want to marry her for Christmas.

programme.title: The Man Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: A critic (Monty Woolley) breaks his hip in someone's home and stays there, in charge, until it mends.

programme.title: Defending Your Life
programme.desc: A heavenly panel must decide whether a deceased yuppie should be granted eternal happiness or be sent back to Earth.

programme.title: Dream Wife
programme.desc: A diplomat/girlfriend (Deborah Kerr) watches her boyfriend (Cary Grant) while he courts an Arab princess during an oil crisis.

programme.title: Cabin in the Sky
programme.desc: Agents of heaven and hell fight for Little Joe's (Eddie

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: The ghost (Kay Hammond) of a novelist's (Rex Harrison) first wife visits him and his second wife (Constance Cummings).

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: A narrator (Frank Craven) relates a couple's (William Holden, Martha Scott) tale of life, love and death in New Hampshire.

programme.title: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lionel Barrymore) overrules son Andy's (Mickey Rooney) puppy love in the first film in the series.

programme.title: You're Only Young Once
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) takes his wife, daughter (Cecilia Parker) and son Andy (Mickey Rooney) to Catalina for a vacation.

programme.title: Judge Hardy's Children
programme.desc: The judge (Lewis Stone) takes the family to Washington, where Andy (Mickey Rooney) livens up a dance party.

programme.title: Love Finds Andy Hardy
programme.desc: Judge Hardy's (Lewis Stone) son (Mickey Rooney) has double-girl trouble, luckily solved by a third girl (Judy Garland).

programme.title: Out West With the Hardys
programme.desc: The judge (Lewis Stone) takes Andy (Mickey Rooney) and the rest of the family on a cattle-ranch vacation.

programme.title: The Hardys Ride High
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) takes son Andy (Mickey Rooney) and the rest of the family to Detroit to inherit $2 million.

programme.title: Andy Hardy Gets Spring Fever
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) tries to talk Andy (Mickey Rooney) out of quitting high school to marry his drama teacher.

programme.title: Judge Hardy and Son
programme.desc: The judge (Lewis Stone) guides Andy (Mickey Rooney) through problems with girls, money and an essay contest.

programme.title: Andy Hardy Meets Debutante
programme.desc: Andy (Mickey Rooney) goes to New York with the judge (Lewis Stone) and tries, through another girl (Judy Garland), to meet a debutante.

programme.title: Andy Hardy's Private Secretary
programme.desc: Andy's (Mickey Rooney) so busy with his secretary (Kathryn Grayson) planning the high-school graduation that he flunks a final.

programme.title: Life Begins for Andy Hardy
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) lets Andy (Mickey Rooney) look for work in New York the summer before he starts college.

programme.title: The Courtship of Andy Hardy
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) orders Andy (Mickey Rooney) to date an unpopular teenager (Donna Reed) whose debilitating shyness may be driving her parents apart.

programme.title: Andy Hardy's Double Life
programme.desc: College-bound Andy (Mickey Rooney) blurts marriage proposals to his sweetheart and her pert swimmer friend (Esther Williams).

programme.title: Andy Hardy's Blonde Trouble
programme.desc: Twin blondes (Lee Wilde) get college man Andy (Mickey Rooney) in hot water with the dean at the judge's (Lewis Stone) alma mater.

programme.title: Love Laughs at Andy Hardy
programme.desc: The judge's (Lewis Stone) son (Mickey Rooney) goes to college after serving in the war and finds his sweetheart (Bonita Granville) is engaged to someone else.

programme.desc: Rupert, a dancing squirrel, is left to fend for himself on the streets after his master turns bankrupt; unsuited for the hard life, Rupert devises a scheme to raise his master's family from poverty.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Four sisters in Massachusetts forge unbreakable family ties in this adaptation of Louisa May Alcott's story.

programme.title: In the Good Old Summertime
programme.desc: The more co-workers (Judy Garland, Van Johnson) fight in a Chicago music store, the more they fall in love as secret pen pals.

programme.title: Holiday Affair
programme.desc: A war widow (Janet Leigh) has a 6-year-old son, and two men (Robert Mitchum, Wendell Corey) who want to marry her for Christmas.

programme.title: The Man Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: A critic (Monty Woolley) breaks his hip in someone's home and stays there, in charge, until it mends.

programme.title: Defending Your Life
programme.desc: A heavenly panel must decide whether a deceased yuppie should be granted eternal happiness or be sent back to Earth.

programme.title: Topper
programme.desc: The ghosts of socialites George (Cary Grant) and Marion (Constance Bennett) decide to help their friend, banker Cosmo Topper (Roland Young).

programme.title: Cabin in the Sky
programme.desc: Agents of heaven and hell fight for Little Joe's (Eddie

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: The ghost (Kay Hammond) of a novelist's (Rex Harrison) first wife visits him and his second wife (Constance Cummings).

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: A narrator (Frank Craven) relates a couple's (William Holden, Martha Scott) tale of life, love and death in New Hampshire.

programme.title: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lionel Barrymore) overrules son Andy's (Mickey Rooney) puppy love in the first film in the series.

programme.title: You're Only Young Once
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) takes his wife, daughter (Cecilia Parker) and son Andy (Mickey Rooney) to Catalina for a vacation.

programme.title: Judge Hardy's Children
programme.desc: The judge (Lewis Stone) takes the family to Washington, where Andy (Mickey Rooney) livens up a dance party.

programme.title: Love Finds Andy Hardy
programme.desc: Judge Hardy's (Lewis Stone) son (Mickey Rooney) has double-girl trouble, luckily solved by a third girl (Judy Garland).

programme.title: Out West With the Hardys
programme.desc: The judge (Lewis Stone) takes Andy (Mickey Rooney) and the rest of the family on a cattle-ranch vacation.

programme.title: The Hardys Ride High
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) takes son Andy (Mickey Rooney) and the rest of the family to Detroit to inherit $2 million.

programme.title: Andy Hardy Gets Spring Fever
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) tries to talk Andy (Mickey Rooney) out of quitting high school to marry his drama teacher.

programme.title: Judge Hardy and Son
programme.desc: The judge (Lewis Stone) guides Andy (Mickey Rooney) through problems with girls, money and an essay contest.

programme.title: Andy Hardy Meets Debutante
programme.desc: Andy (Mickey Rooney) goes to New York with the judge (Lewis Stone) and tries, through another girl (Judy Garland), to meet a debutante.

programme.title: Andy Hardy's Private Secretary
programme.desc: Andy's (Mickey Rooney) so busy with his secretary (Kathryn Grayson) planning the high-school graduation that he flunks a final.

programme.title: Life Begins for Andy Hardy
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) lets Andy (Mickey Rooney) look for work in New York the summer before he starts college.

programme.title: The Courtship of Andy Hardy
programme.desc: Judge Hardy (Lewis Stone) orders Andy (Mickey Rooney) to date an unpopular teenager (Donna Reed) whose debilitating shyness may be driving her parents apart.

programme.title: Andy Hardy's Double Life
programme.desc: College-bound Andy (Mickey Rooney) blurts marriage proposals to his sweetheart and her pert swimmer friend (Esther Williams).

programme.title: Andy Hardy's Blonde Trouble
programme.desc: Twin blondes (Lee Wilde) get college man Andy (Mickey Rooney) in hot water with the dean at the judge's (Lewis Stone) alma mater.

programme.title: Love Laughs at Andy Hardy
programme.desc: The judge's (Lewis Stone) son (Mickey Rooney) goes to college after serving in the war and finds his sweetheart (Bonita Granville) is engaged to someone else.
